nasb.text: As for you, son of man, they will put ropes on you and bind you with them so that you cannot go out among them.

esv.text: And you, O son of man, behold, cords will be placed upon you, and you shall be bound with them, so that you cannot go out among the people.

cnv.text: 人子啊！人要用繩子把你捆綁起來，使你不能出到他們中間去。

ccb.text: 人子啊，他们必把你捆绑起来，使你不能到百姓当中。
